rulings.Case Title: XIAOMEI FENG ET AL VS. JIAWEI JIAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 30, 2019 line . DEFENDANT JIAWEI JIAN Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer; Proof Of Service is CONTINUED for the parties to provide courtesy copies in compliant with Local Rule 2.7(B). =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY MA ET AL VS. PATRICK FOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Third Party Bearing Point Construction, Inc.S Response To Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records And To Impose Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 30, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY MA, RYAN GIN, MICHAEL LUU Motion To Compel Third Party Bearing Point Construction, Inc.S Response To Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records And To Impose Sanctions is DENIED. The Court lacks jurisdiction over Bearing Point Construction under California Code of Civil Procedure section 2025.48. The Court, upon request, will issue an Order to Show Cause to Bearing Point Construction, Inc. as to why contempt sanctions should not be issued for failing to respond to Document Requests 1 through 17 contained in Plaintiffs' Deposition Subpoena for Production of Business Records date June 26, 2019. Plaintiffs' Request for Sanctions is DENIED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE BARADAT FAMILY PARTNERSHIP VS. DENNIS BOYCE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 30, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF THE BARADAT FAMILY PARTNERSHIP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is CONTINUED pursuant to stipulated ex parte granted on January 29, 2020. =(501/CFH)
